data.title: Encryption Protocols
data.description: Strong encryption protocols ensure user data is protected from unauthorized access.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Provides an extra layer of security by requiring two forms of authentication.
data.technical_spec: SMS or authenticator app-based verification codes.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits and tests to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Periodic penetration tests and code reviews.

data.title: Data Anonymization
data.description: User data is anonymized to protect privacy while analyzing user trends.
data.technical_spec: Data is stripped of personally identifying information before analysis.

data.title: Malware Detection Systems
data.description: Advanced anti-malware systems ensure the integrity and security of the app's platform.
